calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-31-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Petitioner: Melinda Rose Palmer, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Melinda Rose Wallace.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-24-2006 Reset To Jan-31-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Melinda Rose Palmer, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Publication of the OSC listed the date of Jan. 27, 2006.
Matter is continued to Jan. 27, 2006 and will be continued to Jan. 31, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218 for Hearing of the OSC for Change of Name.
